parameters.query: SELECT id FROM dex_portfolio WHERE id = 1 AND system_active = true

SELECT w.symbol, w.display_name, w.token_address, t.decimals, t.liquidity_usd FROM watchlist w LEFT JOIN dex_tokens t ON t.address = w.token_address WHERE w.chain = 'solana' AND w.is_active = true ORDER BY w.symbol

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const token = $json.token_address; const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000); const timeFrom = now - (200 * 14400); return `https://public-api.birdeye.so/defi/ohlcv?address=${token}&type=4H&time_from=${timeFrom}&time_to=${now}`; })() }}

parameters.name: input
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ candles: $json.candles, symbol: $json.symbol, chain: 'solana', latest_volume: $json.latest_volume, vol_sma20: $json.vol_sma20 }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO signals (symbol, direction, status, signal_data, chain) VALUES ($1, $2, 'pending', $3::jsonb, 'solana') RETURNING id, symbol, direction, signal_data, chain

SELECT id, usdc_balance as balance, available_usdc, total_value_usdt, total_pnl_usdt, today_pnl_usdt, month_pnl_usdt, month_start_usdc, total_trades, winning_trades, losing_trades, consecutive_losses, system_active, last_loss_at, today_date FROM dex_portfolio WHERE id = 1

parameters.body: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Loop Analyst').item.json; const sd = s.signal_data || {}; return JSON.stringify({ query: `SELECT direction, confidence, predicted_move_pct FROM mindsdb.price_predictor WHERE close = ${sd.current_price || 0} AND volume = ${sd.latest_volume || 0} AND atr14 = ${sd.atr14 || 1} AND roc12 = ${sd.momentum_roc12 || 0} AND volume_ratio = ${sd.volume_ratio || 1} LIMIT 1` }); })() }}

parameters.query: UPDATE signals SET status = 'analyzed', signal_data = signal_data || $1::jsonb WHERE id = $2

parameters.name: input
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ trade_card: $json, portfolio: $('Prepare Analyst Input').item.json.portfolio, chain: 'solana' }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE signals SET status = 'approved' WHERE id = $1
UPDATE signals SET status = 'rejected', signal_data = signal_data || jsonb_build_object('rc_reason', $2::text) WHERE id = $1
